authority_rule: Checksums bind repository contracts and effective inventory rows to the latest externally maintained authoritative appendix sources. The authoritative .tex files are not tracked in this repository. Implementation-status overrides are permitted only for named executable contracts with committed tests and artifact generators.
binding_mode: runtime-enforced manifest binding with generated effective matrix and provenance

dfi_uniqueness_of_decomposition_and_mapp.reason: Typed decomposition, permutation-covariance, additive-total, and reproducibility contract with positive and invalid-mapping tests.

dfi_flowpoint_consistency_and_interface_.reason: Typed feature-involution, component/total consistency, and commuting-interface contract with obstruction tests.

dfi_simulation_consistency_and_simulatio.reason: Typed canonical-versus-simulated DFI validation record with explicit component, total, maximum-error, and breakdown witnesses.
